mechanism: Pension mandate-driven demand at 10Y-30Y maturities previously compressed term premium. As pension plans mature and derisking shifts demand shorter, supply-demand divergence at the long end widens, amplifying the demographic term premium uplift.
regime_dependence: Strengthens as pension plans mature and shift from accumulation to decumulation. UK LDI crisis showed fracture dynamics under stress. Pension bid stabilizes during normal conditions but creates fragile false floor.
